methods.name: opt_into_assets
methods.desc:
This method is called from the master gainify contract to prepare
staking pool instance to accept stake, primary reward,  and secondary reward assets

methods.name: initialize_staking_pool
methods.desc: Initializes the staking pool with various parameters

methods.name: calculate_user_current_earnings
methods.desc:
This method was exclusively simulated, and used to calculate a user's current earnings
It is essentially a duplicate of the `calculate_earnings` subroutine but does not  modify state and is an abimethod instead of internal subroutine

methods.name: add_stake
methods.desc: Add an amount of some ASA to stake

methods.name: claim_reward
methods.desc: Claim The Current Reward Earned for this Staking Pool

methods.name: claim_reward_and_unstake
methods.desc: Claim The Reward for this Staking Pool and Simulatenously Unstake Either a Partial Stake or Full Stake

methods.name: update
methods.desc: Update the application using the creator address
